name: APPARATUS HOQNL
pitch: An ASCII framebuffer inspector that renders images as procedural monospaced glyphs, with crosshair-axis glitch disruption on hover and continuous character mutation at idle.

lifecycle.idle: Image rendered as ASCII character grid with slow sine-driven glyph mutation
lifecycle.discovery: Crosshair axes emerge at cursor position with terminal-green tinting
lifecycle.buildUp: Characters along cursor axes scramble and tear with coordinate disruption
lifecycle.peak: Full axis glitch with random character replacement and color bleed
lifecycle.recovery: Glitch dissolves as crosshair fades, characters restore luminance mapping
